---
title: Appropriate space around math blocks
format:
  preprint-typst:
    include-before-body:
      - text: "#show math.equation.where(block: true): set block(spacing: 1em)"
    theme: default
    keep-typ: true
    citeproc: true
    number-sections: true
---

The fundamental equation is shown in @eq-basic.

$$
E = mc^2
$$ {#eq-basic}

This is an important equation as you all will know.
